TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nauru, title = Nauru, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nauru} }

S.FORM: Nauru hya' ga cyux maki' tay 0 32 S, 166 55 E na Tayangco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 21 sq km (maki' tay 240ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 21 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 9,591. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Yaren District. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 31 na tay qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Baron Waqa, aring ryax 11 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Nauru hya' ga cyux maki' tay 0 32 S, 166 55 E na Tayangco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 21 sq km (maki' tay 240ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 21 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 9,591. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Yaren District. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 31 na tay qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Baron Waqa, aring ryax 11 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: nauru ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** s~…ē, *** ** e na tajaŇč ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a jaren *is~…ētri ¶~ ®t. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj qutux ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤aron waqa, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
